visual_mood: Just-unboxed excitement -- sunglasses resting on their opened packaging, natural window light, genuine customer moment

scene.location: Home dining table near a window, Filipino residential interior
scene.time_of_day: Late morning, soft diffused window light from the left side
scene.atmosphere: Warm domestic setting, wooden dining table surface, the DuberyMNL branded box freshly torn open, tissue paper pushed aside, clean and simple
scene.lighting: Soft natural window light from the left, gentle shadows falling to the right, warm ambient fill from the room, no harsh highlights

product.instruction: The sunglasses should look like a real pair photographed in this scene -- matching the style shown in the reference image. They must look like physical objects with real shadows and highlights, not a digital composite or 3D render.

subject.description: Filipino female, mid-20s, casual home clothing, only her hands visible in frame
subject.action: One hand resting near the sunglasses, the other holding the opened box lid, as if she just set the shades down to admire them

prompt: Rasta Red sunglasses from DuberyMNL rest flat on a wooden dining table beside their freshly opened branded box -- a real pair of matte sunglasses matching the style in the reference image, photographed naturally with real contact shadows on the wood surface, not a digital composite or 3D render. A woman's hands frame the scene -- one near the sunglasses, the other holding the box lid. Vertical 9:16, product centered at 40% of frame height. Dubery logo (red D icon and DUBERY wordmark) in the upper-left corner.
